examples.title: Device Inventory Check
examples.description: Get a complete list of all Nest Protect devices
examples.user_query: Show me all my Nest Protect devices
examples.expected_output: List of all devices with IDs, names, locations, and basic status

examples.title: Device Status Monitoring
examples.description: Check detailed status of a specific device
examples.user_query: How is my kitchen smoke detector?

tool_calls.description: Get comprehensive device information including battery, connectivity, and sensor status

examples.expected_output: Detailed device status including battery level, connectivity, last test date, and current readings

examples.title: Alarm Response
examples.user_query: The smoke alarm is going off in the bedroom!

tool_calls.description: Confirm alarm type and device status
Silence the alarm for 3 minutes to investigate

examples.expected_output: Confirmation of alarm silencing and investigation guidance

examples.title: Safety Testing
examples.description: Perform routine safety checks on devices

tool_calls.description: Get all device IDs for testing

examples.expected_output: Test results for each device with pass/fail status

examples.title: Event History Review
examples.description: Check recent device activity and events
examples.user_query: What happened with my devices last week?
examples.expected_output: Chronological list of device events including tests, alarms, and status changes

examples.title: Battery Monitoring
examples.description: Check battery levels across all devices

tool_calls.description: Get all devices with current status

examples.expected_output: List of devices with battery levels, highlighting any below 20%

examples.title: System Health Check
examples.expected_output: Comprehensive health report with any issues highlighted

examples.title: Tool Help

examples.title: AI Home Safety Assessment
examples.description: Comprehensive AI-powered safety evaluation with sampling
examples.user_query: Do a complete safety check of my entire home

tool_calls.description: AI-powered comprehensive safety assessment with intelligent recommendations

examples.expected_output: Conversational safety report with AI analysis, issue prioritization, and specific recommendations. May trigger sampling for complex analysis.

examples.title: Emergency Response Coordination
examples.description: AI-coordinated emergency response across multiple devices
examples.user_query: There's a fire alarm going off - help me coordinate the response!

tool_calls.description: AI emergency coordination with sampling signals for complex decision-making

examples.expected_output: Coordinated emergency response plan with AI analysis, device control recommendations, and safety guidance

examples.title: Predictive Maintenance Analysis
examples.description: AI forecasting of future maintenance needs
examples.user_query: When should I schedule maintenance for my smoke detectors?

tool_calls.description: AI predictive analysis of maintenance needs with cost projections

examples.expected_output: Predictive maintenance schedule with AI analysis, cost estimates, and prioritized recommendations

tool_calls.description: AI-powered automation setup with pattern learning

examples.expected_output: Smart automation configuration with learning phase guidance and adaptive rule creation
